lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis larr laae le so laagai |
lines.english: He alone is attached to the hem of the Lord's robe, whom the Lord Himself attaches.
Your devotees belong to You, and You belong to Your devotees.
Asleep for countless incarnations, he now awakens. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak ke prabh sad hee saath |4|16|29|
lines.english: Nanak's God is always with him. ||4||16||29||
All beings and creatures are in Your Hands.
You Yourself inspire them to chant Your Praises.
The Lord's Name permeates each and every hair of mine.
The Naam is so useful to me.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the Inner-knower of my heart.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect True Guru has given me this gift. ||1||
It is inaccessible, priceless, infinite and incomparable. ||1||Pause||
The Jewel of the Naam is my treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਬਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam kee mahimaa sabh meh banee |
lines.english: The glory of the Naam spreads over the whole world.
The Naam is my perfect master of wealth.
The Naam is my unmoving, unchanging Lord and Master.
By the Grace of the Saints, I never forget the Naam.
The Naam is my food and love.
The Naam is the objective of my mind.
The Naam is my independence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kirapaa te naam nau nidh paaee |
lines.english: By God's Grace, I have obtained the nine treasures of the Naam.
Repeating the Naam, the Unstruck Sound-current of the Naad resounds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te naam siau ban aaee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I am tuned in to the Naam.
They alone are wealthy and supreme,
O Nanak, who have the treasure of the Naam. ||4||17||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਹਉ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too meraa tthaakur hau daas teraa |
lines.english: You are my Lord and Master; I am Your slave.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਤਾ ਤੂਹੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: too meraa pitaa toohai meraa maataa |
lines.english: You are my Father, and You are my Mother.
You are my Soul, my Breath of Life, the Giver of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑਰੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਉ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tumaree usatat krau din raat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that I may sing Your Praises, day and night. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tujh bin avar nahee ko meraa |1|
lines.english: Without You, I have no one at all. ||1||
Please bless me with Your Mercy, God, and give me this gift,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਤੇਰੇ ਭਿਖਾਰੀ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਾਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ham tere bhikhaaree daan dehi daataaraa |
lines.english: I am Your beggar; please bless me with Your charity, O Great Giver.
I am Your musical instrument, and You are the Musician.
By Your Grace, I enjoy love and pleasures.
By Your Grace, I chant the Name.
You are deep within each and every heart. ||2||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I sing Your Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑਰੀ ਦਇਆ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਦਰਦ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: tumaree deaa te hoe darad binaas |
lines.english: In Your Mercy, You take away our pains.
I am a sacrifice to the Divine Guru.
By Your Mercy, the heart-lotus blossoms forth. ||3||
that Nanak may continually sing Your Glorious Praises. ||4||18||31||
Be Merciful to me, O my Lord God and Master,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: safal darasan jaa kee niramal sev |
lines.english: The Blessed Vision of His Darshan is fruitful and rewarding; His service is immaculate and pure.
I humbly bow to Him, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooch jaa kaa darabaar |
lines.english: His Regal Court is the highest of all.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੇ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਥਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: aooche te aoochaa jaa kaa thaan |
lines.english: His place is the highest of the high.
Millions of sins are erased by the Name of the Lord. ||1||
In His Sanctuary, we find eternal peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਕਰਤਬ ਲਖੇ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ke karatab lakhe na jaeh |
lines.english: His wondrous actions cannot even be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਮੇਲੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jaa kau melai soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He Mercifully unites us with Himself. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa bharavaasaa sabh ghatt maeh |
lines.english: All hearts rest their faith and hope in Him.
He gives, but His treasures are never exhausted.
The devotees lovingly worship and adore Him night and day. ||2||
He is manifest in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਤਿਸੈ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis kee ott tisai kee aasaa |
lines.english: He is my Anchor and Support; I place my hopes in Him.
In an instant, He establishes and disestablishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa hukam na mettai koe |
lines.english: No one can erase the Hukam of His Command.
The True Lord is above the heads of kings. ||3||
